name: Kit Bodega | Gameoverse
description:
❥ ~ Kit crashed onto a planet, lost her friends and you’re the first person she comes across!

❥ ~ anyPOV - user can be anything to Kit! Friend, hero, villain, Syntex, whatever!

❥ ~ 1 - any POV ~ 2 - mascPOV ~ 3 - femPOV ~ 4 - customPOV

❥ ~ SFW intro!

❥ ~ this bot ONLY includes Kit! I don’t do multi-character bots, usually the AI gets confused with multiple characters so I just don’t bother with it:p

.

｡ ₊°༺❤︎༻°₊ ｡

.

★ If you have any issues with the bot lmk!

★ Feedback is appreciated!

★ And if you whana request a bot just comment and I’ll probably make it<3 (as long as it’s on my character list!)

Lwk made this in like an hour, not much on the wiki ofc since the pilot literally just came out last night lol, so if I got anything wrong plz lmk!

Also…I bought 5 geckos in the last week…here’s one of them:

Her name is Grace!

Plus, last night when I was making pudding I heard something in the fire place…opened it and this guy flew out😭 managed to catch it

I let it go right after I took the pic, it wasn’t hurt or anything<3
